User.title: User Profile and Access
User.description: Stores user data including purchases and subscription status

PlannerData.title: Generic Planner State
PlannerData.description: Stores the JSON state for any particular tab/planner

users/{userId}.description: User profile document containing access levels

users/{userId}/planner_data/{docId}.description: The saved states of individual planner views (like adhd-planner-2026_tasks)
